settings.content:
At AutoFull, we are committed to delivering your order quickly, reliably, and with full transparency throughout the process.

Free Shipping

AutoFull offers free standard shipping on all orders within the United States, with no minimum purchase required.

  • Shipping is available within the contiguous U.S. only
  • We currently do not ship to Alaska, Hawaii, Puerto Rico, or military APO, FPO, and DPO addresses
  • PO Boxes are not supported

Order Processing

  • Orders are typically processed within 1 business day
  • Orders placed on weekdays are generally processed on the same day
  • Orders placed after this time will be processed on the next business day

Processing times may vary slightly depending on product availability and order volume.

Shipping & Delivery

  • Orders are shipped via FedEx Ground or UPS
  • Estimated delivery time is 3–7 business days, depending on your location
  • Most orders are delivered within 3 - 4 business days under normal conditions

Please note: delivery times may be extended for remote or less accessible locations.

Tracking Your Order

Once your order ships, you will receive a shipping confirmation email with a tracking number.

  • Tracking information may take up to 24 hours to update
  • You can monitor your shipment status at any time using the tracking link provided

We recommend tracking your order and ensuring someone is available to receive the delivery.

Delivery Information

  • All packages are shipped without a signature requirement by default
  • AutoFull is not responsible for lost or stolen packages after delivery confirmation
  • If you require signature confirmation or special delivery instructions, please contact the carrier directly after your order has shipped

Shipping Damage

All AutoFull products are shipped in secure, factory-sealed packaging to ensure they arrive in excellent condition.

If your order arrives damaged:

  • Please contact us at service@autofull.com within 7 days of delivery
  • Include photos and a description of the issue
  • Our team will promptly assist in resolving the matter

Additional Notes

  • Delivery timelines may be affected by carrier delays, weather conditions, or other factors beyond our control
  • We are not responsible for delays caused by third-party shipping carriers

settings.title: Contact Us
settings.content: For any warranty inquiries, don't hesitate to email us at service@autofull.com. We're here to help!
